description: Apply Standard V (Investment Analysis, Recommendations, and Actions) — Diligence & Reasonable Basis, Communication with Clients, and Record Retention — to research and recommendations

v_a_diligence_reasonable_basis.rule: Exercise diligence, independence, thoroughness; have reasonable and adequate basis for recommendations
v_a_diligence_reasonable_basis.third_party_research: Assess quality and independence before relying
v_a_diligence_reasonable_basis.group_research: OK to rely on group opinion even when individual disagrees, provided reasonable basis

v_b_communication_with_clients.distinguish: Separate fact from opinion in reports
v_b_communication_with_clients.risks_and_limitations: Disclose significant limitations, basic characteristics, investment process

v_c_record_retention.rule: Maintain records supporting analysis, recommendations, investment action, client communications
v_c_record_retention.firm_ownership: Records belong to firm; take copies only with permission

recommended_procedures.research_policy: Written policy on reasonable basis standards

errors.message: substandard must be v_a, v_b, or v_c

anti_patterns.rule: Do not rely on third-party research without vetting
anti_patterns.why: Standard V(A) requires reasonable basis; undocumented reliance fails the diligence test

anti_patterns.rule: Do not blur fact and opinion in research reports
anti_patterns.why: Readers interpret unlabeled projections as facts; V(B) requires explicit separation

anti_patterns.rule: Do not delete internal analysis records on portfolio unwind
anti_patterns.why: V(C) requires retention of supporting material for a reasonable period — 7 years is standard practice
